title: oscore/edhoc: many heapless::Vec push() calls ignore results
description: In edhoc.rs, lines 87-128, 296-334, 346-394, etc. use 'let _ = ...' to ignore push/extend_from_slice results. While buffer overflows are unlikely with sized heapless::Vec, silently ignoring errors is fragile. Either propagate errors with ? or use a helper that handles the push + map_err pattern.
